2604.18491.title: Faster by Design: Interactive Aerodynamics via Neural Surrogates Trained on Expert-Validated CFD
2604.18491.paper_summary: Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) is central to race-car aerodynamic development, yet its cost -- tens of thousands of core-hours per high-fidelity evaluation -- severely limits the design space exploration feasible within realistic budgets. AI-based surrogate models promise to alleviate this bottleneck, but progress has been constrained by the limited complexity of public datasets, which are dominated by smoothed passenger-car shapes that fail to exercise surrogates on the thin, complex, highly loaded components governing motorsport performance. This work presents three primary contributions. First, we introduce a high-fidelity RANS dataset built on a parametric LMP2-class CAD model and spanning six operating conditions (map points) covering straight-line and cornering regimes, generated and validated by aerodynamics experts at Dallara to preserve features relevant to industrial motorsport. Second, we present the Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST), a graph-based neural operator whose spectral embeddings encode mesh connectivity to enhance predictions on tightly packed, complex geometries. GIST guarantees discretization invariance and scales linearly with mesh size, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on both public benchmarks and the proposed race-car dataset. Third, we demonstrate that GIST achieves a level of predictive accuracy suitable for early-stage aerodynamic design, providing a first validation of the concept of interactive design-space exploration -- where engineers query a surrogate in place of the CFD solver -- within industrial motorsport workflows.
2604.18491.paper_summary_zh: 計算流體力學 (CFD) 是賽車氣動力學開發的核心，但其成本——每次高保真評估需數萬核心小時——嚴重限制了在現實預算內可行的設計空間探索。基於人工智慧的替代模型有望緩解這一瓶頸，但進展受到公共數據集有限複雜性的制約，這些數據集主要由平滑的乘用車形狀組成，無法對賽車性能的薄型、複雜、高負載組件進行有效的替代測試。本研究提出了三個主要貢獻。首先，我們介紹了一個高保真的 RANS 數據集，該數據集基於參數化的 LMP2 類 CAD 模型，涵蓋六種操作條件（地圖點），包括直線和過彎狀態，由 Dallara 的氣動力學專家生成和驗證，以保留與工業賽車相關的特徵。其次，我們提出了 Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST)，這是一種基於圖形的神經運算元，其光譜嵌入編碼網格連接性，以增強對緊密堆疊的複雜幾何形狀的預測。GIST 保證離散化不變性，並隨著網格大小線性擴展，在公共基準測試和所提出的賽車數據集上達到了最先進的準確性。第三，我們展示了 GIST 達到適合早期氣動力學設計的預測準確性，為互動設計空間探索的概念提供了首次驗證——在工業賽車工作流程中，工程師用替代模型代替 CFD 解算器進行查詢。
2604.18491.author: Nicholas Thumiger et.al.
2604.18491.authors: Nicholas Thumiger, Andrea Bartezzaghi, Mattia Rigotti, Cezary Skura, Thomas Frick, Elisa Serioli, Fabrizio Arbucci, A. Cristiano I. Malossi
